title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SAPA-SAPA BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TANDU BAS, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO TUAN LIGADDUNG LIPAE BARRIO SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2930 / 59 OG No. 46, 7881 (November 18, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3715, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SAPA-SAPA BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TANDU BAS, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO TUAN LIGADDUNG LIPAE BARRIO SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Sapa-Sapa Barrio School in the Municipality of Tandu Bas, Province of Sulu, is hereby changed to Tuan Ligaddung Lipae Barrio School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval,

Approved, June 22, 1963.
